problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE guarantee statements in component type annex reference implementation-level subcomponent ports
problems.minimal_edit: Move the annex block from MAGNETO component type to MAGNETO.IMPL component implementation

executor_steps: Remove the annex agree block from the MAGNETO component type
Add a new annex agree block to the MAGNETO.IMPL component implementation
In the new implementation annex, replace the guarantee statements with assign statements that relate the implementation's output ports to the subcomponent's output ports
Ensure the assign statements reference only visible symbols from the implementation scope
